steps.title: Read the token values
steps.content: In $70T+85C=1{,}240$, the coefficient of $T$ shows that each triangle token is worth $70$ points. The coefficient of $C$ shows that each circle token is worth $85$ points.

steps.title: Find the difference
steps.content: Subtract the triangle-token value from the circle-token value: $$ 85-70=15 $$ The answer is D.
